MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-06-15 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: June 2, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782.

Jerome Yalone, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Dscover Bank, Issuer of the Discover Card.
Matthew Jackson, Esq. appeared with defendant Margaret Irene Walker, a/k/a Margaret Walker, a/k/a Margaret I. Walker, who was placed under oath and voir dired.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 21, 2008.
Settlement Agreement reached by the parties is approved by the Court.

In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant Margaret Irene Walker, a/k/a Margaret Walker, a/k/a Margaret I. Walker shall pay plaintiff Discover Bank, Issuer of the Discover Card, the sum of $6,399.45. Said amount shall be paid in monthly installments in the amount of $75.00 per month commencing June 10, 2008 and continuing until the balance is paid in full. No further interest shall accrue provided defendant remains current in her payments. If the principle amount is paid in full by defendant Margaret Irene Walker, a/k/a Margaret Walker, a/k/a Margaret I. Walker, defendant Discover Bank, Issuer of the Discover Card shall dismiss this matter with prejudice, with each party to bear their own fees and costs.

If defendant Margaret Irene Walker, a/k/a Margaret Walker, a/k/a Margaret I. Walker fails to make timely payments, and upon thirty day notice to defendant's counsel of non-payments, counsel for plaintif may obtain judgment for the remaining principle, along with attorney's fees in the amount of $975.00 and costs in the amount of $225.00.

Matter is continued to October 6, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
